hero.title: Shop Everything in Bangladesh
hero.subtitle: Retail & Wholesale — Best Prices, Fast Delivery

footer.tagline: Bangladesh's trusted retail & wholesale ecommerce platform. Quality products, competitive prices.

business.title: Partner With OceanBazar
business.subtitle: Whether you're looking for bulk procurement, corporate gifting, reseller partnerships, or brand collaboration — we'd love to hear from you.
business.whySub: OceanBazar is built to support businesses of all sizes across Bangladesh.
business.feat1Body: Access a logistics network spanning all 64 districts of Bangladesh with reliable last-mile delivery.
business.feat2Body: Automatic volume-based discounts — the more you order, the more you save. No negotiation needed.
business.feat3Body: Every seller is verified. Products are quality-checked. Full buyer protection on every order.
business.feat4Body: Business accounts get a priority support queue with faster response times for critical issues.
business.feat5Body: All transactions encrypted end-to-end. Pay via bKash, Nagad, SSLCommerz, or bank transfer.
business.feat6Body: Need branded packaging, scheduled deliveries, or custom catalogs? We build solutions around your needs.
business.ctaSub: Fill in the form below and our business team will reach out within 24–48 hours.
business.name: Your name
business.messagePlaceholder: Describe your business, expected order volume, product interests, or partnership idea…
business.success: Thank you! Our business team will contact you within 24–48 hours.

tickets.title: Support Tickets
tickets.subject: Subject
tickets.pageDesc: Submit a dispute, return request, or general support query. Our team responds within 1–2 business days.
tickets.howStep1Sub: Fill in the form with your order details
tickets.messagePlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail. Include photo references if relevant.
tickets.noTicketsDesc: Open a ticket whenever you have an issue with an order, product, or payment.

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Find answers quickly or get in touch with our team. We respond to all tickets within 1–2 business days.
support.helpTitle: What do you need help with?
support.orderIssuesSub: Missing item, wrong product, delayed delivery
support.paymentProblemsSub: Failed payment, double charge, refund timing
support.deliveryTrackingSub: Track your shipment, rescheduling, courier contact
support.accountPointsSub: Login issues, points balance, tier status
support.disputeStep1Sub: Include your Order ID and describe the issue clearly.
support.disputeStep2Sub: We investigate within 1–2 business days and may request evidence.
support.disputeStep3Sub: We notify you of the outcome — refund, replacement, or explanation.
support.disputeStep4Sub: Approved actions are executed within the stated timelines.
support.returnStep1Sub: 7-day window from delivery. Item must be unused and in original packaging.
support.returnStep2Sub: Go to My Orders → select item → Return / Dispute.
support.returnStep3Sub: Once approved, courier pickup is arranged within 1–3 days.
support.returnStep4Sub: After inspection passes, refund is initiated within 3 business days.
support.faq1q: How do I return an item?
support.faq1a: Go to My Orders, select the order, and tap "Return / Dispute". Fill in the reason and submit. Our team reviews within 1–2 business days.
support.faq2q: When will I get my refund?
support.faq2a: After your return is approved and the item passes inspection, refunds are processed within 1–3 business days for mobile wallets, or 5–10 days for card/bank payments.
support.faq3q: My order hasn't arrived. What should I do?
support.faq3a: Check your order tracking timeline first. If the estimated delivery window has passed, open a support ticket with your Order ID and we'll investigate.
support.faq4q: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
support.faq4a: Address changes are only possible before dispatch. Contact support immediately with your Order ID. We cannot change the address once the order is with the courier.
support.faq5q: How do I apply for wholesale access?
support.faq5a: Visit the Wholesale Hub page and fill in the application form. Our team reviews applications within 2–3 business days.
support.faq6a: We accept bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay, SSLCommerz (card & internet banking), and Cash on Delivery (up to ৳5,000).
support.faq7q: My payment failed but money was deducted. What happens?
support.faq7a: Failed payment deductions are auto-reversed by the payment provider within 3–5 business days. If not, open a ticket with your transaction reference number.
support.faq8a: You earn 1 OB Point for every ৳1 spent. Points can be redeemed for discounts at checkout. Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers offer increasing redemption limits.
support.supportTicketsDesc: Open a ticket for order disputes, payment issues, or product complaints. Full message history stored.
support.policyDocsDesc: Read our Return, Refund, Shipping, Warranty, and Terms policies for complete details.

wholesale.heroSub: Unlock wholesale pricing automatically — add 25+ units to your cart and the price switches instantly. No waiting, no negotiation.
wholesale.whySub: Everything you get when your account is approved for wholesale access.
wholesale.benefit1Body: Up to 8% off on bulk orders — tiered pricing unlocks automatically when you hit the MOQ.
wholesale.benefit2Body: No manual negotiation. Wholesale pricing activates the moment your cart quantity meets MOQ.
wholesale.benefit3Body: Track all your large orders in one place with priority fulfillment and dedicated support.
wholesale.benefit4Body: Every wholesale order is covered by our full order protection policy and money-back guarantee.
wholesale.benefit5Body: Wholesale accounts get dedicated support queue — faster responses for business-critical issues.
wholesale.benefit6Body: Reorder from your history in one click. Reliable restocking for high-volume buyers.
wholesale.pricingSub: Both account types get volume discounts — wholesale pricing is a separate, lower base price.
wholesale.comparisonTitle: Retail vs Wholesale — at a glance
wholesale.comparisonSub: See exactly what each account type unlocks.
wholesale.readySub: Fill in the application below. Our team reviews every request within 2–3 business days.
wholesale.loginToApply: Please login to apply for wholesale access.
wholesale.alreadyWholesale: Your account already has wholesale access.
wholesale.appSubmittedHint: We'll review your application and update your account once approved.
wholesale.step1: Submit the application form with your business details.
wholesale.step2: Our team reviews your application within 2–3 business days.
wholesale.step3: Once approved, your account is upgraded to wholesale instantly.
wholesale.step4: All future orders above MOQ will use wholesale pricing automatically.
wholesale.approvalNote: Wholesale approval is manual. Your account stays retail until an admin approves your application.

marketing.heroSub: One platform for everyday shoppers and bulk buyers — secure payments, nationwide logistics, and automatic wholesale pricing for qualified businesses.
marketing.whySub: Built specifically for the Bangladeshi market — retail and wholesale in a single, unified experience.
marketing.feat1Body: Currency in BDT, Bangla + English UI, local payment gateways — everything built for the local market.
marketing.feat2Body: Tiered discounts apply automatically as you add more items. No coupon codes needed.
marketing.feat3Body: Every order is covered. Dispute resolution, money-back guarantee, and verified fulfillment.
marketing.feat4Body: Earn 1 OB Point per ৳1 spent. Redeem for discounts. Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers.
marketing.logisticsSub: Delivery coverage across all 64 districts. We partner with reliable couriers to ensure your order reaches you — Dhaka or Sylhet, Cox's Bazar or Rajshahi.
marketing.paymentsSub: All transactions are encrypted. Choose from Bangladesh's most popular payment methods — mobile banking, cards, or cash on delivery.
marketing.protect2: No card details stored on our servers
marketing.protect6: COD available for orders up to ৳5,000
marketing.deliverySub: We work with trusted courier partners to ensure your orders arrive on time. Real-time updates keep you informed at every step.
marketing.del1Body: Orders placed before 12pm are dispatched the same business day.
marketing.del2Body: Standard nationwide delivery. Dhaka metro may arrive faster.
marketing.del3Body: Missed delivery? Our support team coordinates redelivery for you.
marketing.wholesaleSub: Whether you run a shop, source for resale, or buy in bulk for your business — OceanBazar wholesale gives you lower prices automatically.
marketing.wPoint1: Automatic wholesale price at MOQ (25+ units)
marketing.wPoint2: Up to 8% additional volume discount on wholesale base
marketing.wPoint3: Separate pricing tier from retail — not just a coupon
marketing.wPoint4: Priority order fulfillment for large orders
marketing.who1Body: Source products at wholesale rates and maximize your margin.
marketing.who2Body: Scale purchasing as your business grows — pricing scales with you.
marketing.who3Body: Bulk procurement for offices, institutions, and enterprises.
marketing.ctaSub: Retail or wholesale — one account, one platform, the best prices in Bangladesh.

policies.title: Policies
policies.privacyIntro: We respect your privacy and protect your personal information.
policies.returnIntro: Eligible products can be returned within the allowed return window.
policies.refundIntro: Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method when possible.
policies.shippingIntro: Delivery timelines may vary based on product type and location.
